key_dungeons.name: Dragon's Lair
key_dungeons.description: A shattered keep on the far northeastern isle. The cliffs smoke, the surf steams where it strikes the shore — something ancient sleeps below.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Descend the Dragon's Lair, slay the wyrm, and return with the Dragonheart
key_dungeons.quest_hint: The Sage in Larian said the Sun Sword is the only blade worthy of the task.

game_log: Hollis the Shopkeep: Hail, traveler. Thou hast the look of one who can handle trouble, and I am up to my ears in it. I own the General Shop here in Larian. Some months back I let a goblin lodge in my cellar in exchange for a small favor — the details are not important now. He has since let the place fall to ruin. Rats have overrun the basement, and the goblin himself grows bolder by the day. Clear them all out and I shall see thee well rewarded.
Hollis the Shopkeep: Wonderful! I'm counting on you. Good luck out there!
Quest 'Rat Infestation': Clear rats from the General Shop - Complete!
Quest 'Rat Infestation': Evict the goblin squatter - Complete!
Quest 'Rat Infestation': Hunt the deeper nests in the basement - Complete! | All steps done! Return to the quest giver for your reward.
Jarraad: Be wary of going too deep and venturing far from town until you are ready
Hollis the Shopkeep: Thank you, hero! Here is your reward: +100 XP, +100 Gold, +2 items (Camping Supplies, Arrows)

Huntsman Puck: The realm is overrun with giant wolves, and no natural pack moves like these do. An orc hand guides them, I'd wager my last arrow on it. Thin the packs first — then find the brute pulling their strings. Do us this dastardly favor and I'll keep thy quiver full for a season.
Huntsman Puck: Wonderful! I'm counting on you. Good luck out there!
Quest 'Wolfman Puck': Find and slay the orc driving them - Complete!
Quest 'Wolfman Puck': Cull the wolf packs in the wilds - Complete! | All steps done! Return to the quest giver for your reward.
Huntsman Puck: Thank you, hero! Here is your reward: +200 XP, +200 Gold, +Arrows

Lardo the Bardo: Listen well, friend, for I sing of more than pretty tales these days. The goblin horde has taken the old stronghold to the north, and scarce a week passes without a caravan lost upon the road. If thou hast the steel for it, break their ranks at the source. Larian will remember the deed — and I shall make the reward worth thy while.
Lardo the Bardo: [Adventurer's Note: This quest will take you into the Goblin Stronghold dungeon — tread carefully.]
Lardo the Bardo: Wonderful! I'm counting on you. Good luck out there!
